properties.titulo_evento: Greece to buy $4 billion air defense system from Israel
properties.descricao: Greece has approved the purchase of a multi-layer air defense system worth up to €3.5 billion ($4 billion) from Israel.

properties.titulo_evento: Who is Mykhailo Drapatyi? ‘The Flying BMP’ who now leads Ukraine’s military
properties.descricao: Zelenskyy names reform-minded Drapatyi as new commander-in-chief, replacing Syrsyki to bend to the largest protests of the war over the firing of Fedorov.

properties.titulo_evento: Unfazed by Iran’s threats, Bulgaria moves to aid U.S. military operations
properties.descricao: A Bulgarian parliamentary committee has approved a U.S. request to let American forces use a local air base to support the U.S. war against Iran.

properties.titulo_evento: Backed by France, Macron sees Germany as nuclear-deterrence ‘vanguard’ in Europe
properties.descricao: A French nuclear-capable Rafale jet had been temporarily hosted at a German air base − specifically at Nörvenich near Cologne.

properties.titulo_evento: US attacks Iran as Houthis allow Chinese ships to pass: What’s the latest?
properties.descricao: The number of tanker crossings in the Strait of Hormuz dropped to lowest levels in two months on Thursday.

properties.titulo_evento: Mykhailo Drapatyi: Can new Ukraine army chief alter Russia war’s direction?
properties.descricao: In 2014, a young Drapatyi became an icon for his daredevilry in Mariupol. Can he lead his military to victory?

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine beheads its military as its performance begins to soar
properties.descricao: An unprecedented simultaneous replacement of the top defence and military brass comes amid a debate over strategy.

properties.titulo_evento: Trillion dollar US defence bill would deepen military ties with Israel
properties.descricao: A $1.15 trillion US defence bill passed by the House includes plans to expand military cooperation with Israel.

properties.titulo_evento: Israel carries out blasts across south Lebanon despite ‘ceasefire’ deal
properties.descricao: Israeli attacks come amid ongoing talks with Lebanese officials to implement framework for peace between two countries.

properties.titulo_evento: As oil soars, experts watch Red Sea tankers for clarity on Houthi blockade
properties.descricao: Houthi attacks for now are shaping who moves Saudi crude, not whether it moves, analysts say, even as oil prices soar.

properties.titulo_evento: US launches 13th night of strikes as Iran warns of escalation in the Gulf
properties.descricao: Al Jazeera’s Tohid Asadi reports from Tehran as the US launches strikes for the 13th consecutive night.

properties.titulo_evento: Analyst: voting against Iran war funding a tough sell for Congress
properties.descricao: The US says it has spent more than $37.5 billion on the Iran war so far.

properties.titulo_evento: Israel bombs Gaza after displacement orders, kills two Palestinians
properties.descricao: Humanitarian situation in Gaza is 'desperate', UN official says, as Israeli violations of 'ceasefire' intensify.

properties.titulo_evento: UN envoy for Yemen ‘alarmed’ by Houthis’ Red Sea attacks, calls for talks
properties.descricao: Hans Grundberg warns that further confrontation risks 'deepening the suffering of the Yemeni people'.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war live: US completes 13th night of strikes on Iran
properties.descricao: Trump says he is considering a ‘massive attack’, as Iran's Araghchi says 'mindless aggression' won't help a deal.

properties.titulo_evento: Two Palestinians killed as Israel intensifies strikes on Gaza City
properties.descricao: Two Palestinians were killed and several others injured in a new wave of Israeli airstrikes on Gaza City.

properties.titulo_evento: How the Houthi Red Sea blockade will impact the world
properties.descricao: The Houthis' blockade of Bab al-Mandeb threatens a vital global trade route.

properties.titulo_evento: Saudis must recognise Israel for nuclear deal, says Trump
properties.descricao: The US president says the landmark agreement to help Saudis develop nuclear energy is dependent on it joining the Abraham Accords.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine's ousted defence minister insists on being reinstated
properties.descricao: Mykhailo Fedorov refuses President Zelensky's offer to accept an alternative post, as the battle of wills continues.

properties.titulo_evento: Russia's businesses under strain from Ukraine's attacks on Wildberries
properties.descricao: Ukrainian drones have hit several retail warehouses belonging to Russia's biggest online retailer Wildberries in a matter of days.

properties.titulo_evento: Canada's 'powerful' dairy sector is in Trump's trade crosshairs
properties.descricao: Canada's industry is in the spotlight after the US president singled it out as one of three main irritants used to justify new tariffs.

properties.titulo_evento: Mamdani backs off pledge to arrest Netanyahu citing lack of authority
properties.descricao: The New York City mayor instead called on US authorities to act on International Criminal Court's arrest warrant against the Israeli prime minister.

properties.titulo_evento: Houthi attacks raise fears of wider Middle East conflict and more global economic damage
properties.descricao: The Iran-backed group in Yemen has threatened to target Saudi vessels in a vital shipping route.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump's nuclear deal with Saudis jettisons longstanding US demands
properties.descricao: Signing a nuclear pact in the Middle East is a bold move that has drawn criticism in the US and in Israel.

properties.titulo_evento: 'What was their crime?': BBC visits Iran school where strike killed 120 children
properties.descricao: Nearly five months on, grief is still raw as a teacher and a mother recall the horror of the attack in Minab.

properties.titulo_evento: Live: Thousands forced to flee as deadly wildfires rage in parts of France, Italy and Spain
properties.descricao: Thousands of people were forced to flee deadly wildfires that continued to sweep through parts of France, Spain and Italy on Friday. Hundreds of firefighters backed by water-bombing planes battled the blazes fanned by scorching temperatures and stro...

properties.titulo_evento: US launches new strikes on Iran over shipping routes threat
properties.descricao: The US said the latest strikes were aimed at weakening the threat Iran poses to commercial shipping in the Strait of Hormuz. The US has now attacked Iran for 13 consecutive nights. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Wildfires in Europe prompt tens of thousands to evacuate
properties.descricao: Spain has declared a national emergency in the Madrid region. In neighboring France, meanwhile, President Emmanuel Macron has invoked the EU's civil protection mechanism to ask for help.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany seeks energy and trading partners in Africa
properties.descricao: Germany wants to boost relations with Africa. During his trip, German Foreign Minister Johann Wadephul has promoted cooperation on energy, infrastructure and the economy. He also criticized US treatment of South Africa.

properties.titulo_evento: US threatens 'major military punishment' for Houthi attacks
properties.descricao: President Donald Trump threatened to strike Iran and the Houthi militants over attacks on Saudi tankers. Meanwhile, the UN warned that the situation is "out of control." DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: US-Saudi nuclear deal: How will it impact Middle East, US-Iran war?
properties.descricao: Critics say the US-Saudi deal could spark a nuclear arms race in the Middle East. It's certainly not making US allies, like Israel and the UAE, happy. And reports suggest the US may already be backtracking on the deal.

properties.titulo_evento: Is Germany investing in the right weapons?
properties.descricao: Germany wants to build up its army and pour hundreds of millions of euros into its defenses. But in a world where the battlefield is increasingly dominated by cheap drones, how many expensive tanks does the country need?

properties.titulo_evento: US strikes on southern Iran infrastructure widen war
properties.descricao: The latest US strikes on tunnels, bridges and other infrastructure further inland from the Strait of Hormuz could indicate that Washington is shifting gears in Iran.

properties.titulo_evento: ECB keeps interest rates unchanged amid Iran war inflation
properties.descricao: The European Central Bank has kept its base interest rates steady but said it was "closely monitoring" the energy price shock. The impact of the war against Iran on energy costs has pushed inflation over ECB targets.

properties.titulo_evento: Canada-EU: Closer trade ties to counter Trump?
properties.descricao: Given they share the world's longest land border, Canada and the US have historically enjoyed fruitful trade relations. But with Donald Trump escalating his tariff war, Canada is looking to the EU and further afield.

properties.titulo_evento: Oil prices jump as Hormuz, Red Sea crises deepen
properties.descricao: Renewed strikes on shipping in the Gulf and the Red Sea have dealt a fresh double blow to global oil markets. As prices climb once again, DW examines what else could keep them elevated.

properties.titulo_evento: US-China AI rivalry heats up as Chinese models gain ground
properties.descricao: China's AI platforms are rapidly closing the gap with their US counterparts, prompting fresh threats from the Trump administration. With accusations of intellectual property theft, could tensions boil over?

properties.titulo_evento: Will Europe warm to Britain’s new prime minister?
properties.descricao: He’s the seventh British prime minister to walk through the famous black door of Number 10 Downing Street since the Brexit vote 10 years ago. Can Andy Burnham refresh relations with Europe and rescue a reset with Brussel...

properties.titulo_evento: Merz ally challenges Germany’s far-right firewall ahead of crucial state elections
properties.descricao: The far-right AfD is set to perform well in elections in September in its political heartland in the eastern part of the country.

properties.titulo_evento: EU’s Google fine risks triggering Trump as he gears up for more tariffs
properties.descricao: The fine against the U.S. tech giant lands just as Washington prepares new duties that could put last year’s fragile trade truce to the test.

properties.titulo_evento: Oil prices jump on US-Iran strikes, stocks flat ahead of Big Tech results
Brent Crude Oil Prices Top $100 as Conflict With Iran Drags On
properties.descricao: Stocks in Asia were down following a sell-off in the U.S. markets over soaring oil prices, rising borrowing costs and worries about the technology industry.

properties.titulo_evento: U.S. Withdraws Subpoenas Issued to New York Times Journalists
properties.descricao: A federal judge raised questions about the government’s handling of the subpoenas, which The Times called an attempt to intimidate the free press.

properties.titulo_evento: China Rewrites the ‘Soft Power’ Playbook for the A.I. Age
properties.descricao: China is seeking global influence and good will with its open, low-cost artificial intelligence software.

properties.titulo_evento: Even as War Rages, Investors Bet Oil Will Be Cheaper in a Few Months
properties.descricao: Futures contracts reflect an expectation that low inventories and midterm elections are likely to push the Trump administration to try to ease tensions with Iran.

properties.titulo_evento: Global Oil Price Hits $100 a Barrel for First Time Since May
properties.descricao: The recent rebound reflects traders’ growing concern about the expanding war, which now extends from the Persian Gulf to the Red Sea.
